expectations.text: Uses the google-generativeai Python SDK (import google.generativeai)
expectations.evidence: Uses openai package instead. Mentions Gemini as alternative at end but doesn't use it.

expectations.text: Reads GEMINI_API_KEY from environment variable or ~/scripts/ecosystem.env
Uses an appropriate Gemini model (Flash for cost efficiency or Pro for accuracy)
expectations.evidence: Uses gpt-3.5-turbo, not a Gemini model

expectations.text: Sends transactions in a structured prompt and parses the categorized response
expectations.evidence: Sends structured prompt and parses response

expectations.text: Includes error handling for API rate limits or failures
expectations.evidence: No error handling or rate limit logic
